headline: Bioliberty Raises $10.2 million to Build Functional Intelligence Capabilities for Post‑Acute Care
summary: Lifepoint Health’s Russell Bailey and CVS Health’s Dana Prommel Strauss to Bring Additional Healthcare Depth to Bioliberty Board of Directors Bioliberty U.S.-based executives and board members Pictured here from left to right are new board members Russel Bailey, PT, FACHE, President, Lifepoint Rehabilitation, and Dana Prommel Strauss, DPT, Lead Director, Public Policy and Government Affairs, CVS Health, with Bioliberty Chief Executive Officer Rowan Armstrong, MEng, RAEng, Bioliberty Chief Commer

content.title: Bioliberty Raises $10.2 million to Build Functional Intelligence Capabilities for Post‑Acute Care
content.summary: Lifepoint Health’s Russell Bailey and CVS Health’s Dana Prommel Strauss to Bring Additional Healthcare Depth to Bioliberty Board of Directors Bioliberty U.S.-based executives and board members Pictured here from left to right are new board members Russel Bailey, PT, FACHE, President, Lifepoint Rehabilitation, and Dana Prommel Strauss, DPT, Lead Director, Public Policy and Government Affairs, CVS Health, with Bioliberty Chief Executive Officer Rowan Armstrong, MEng, RAEng, Bioliberty Chief Commer

thumbnail.caption: Pictured here from left to right are new board members Russel Bailey, PT, FACHE, President, Lifepoint Rehabilitation, and Dana Prommel Strauss, DPT, Lead Director, Public Policy and Government Affairs, CVS Health, with Bioliberty Chief Executive Officer Rowan Armstrong, MEng, RAEng, Bioliberty Chief Commercial Officer Conan Bradley, MEng, and board member David O'Reilly, MBA, Managing Director, Bayview Biosciences, LLC.
